name: Moza AirCross S Gimbal Stabilizer
description: Shoot with up to three devices simultaneously using this Moza AirCross S 3-in-1 Gimbal Stabilizer and its L-bracket mount, extended arm axis range, and 4 lb load capacity for the ultimate content-creating machine.

features.Key Features:: Mount Three Devices on One Gimbal | 4 lb Load Capacity | Supports Vertical Shooting Orientations | Extended Arm Axis Range, L-Bracket | Arca-Type Quick Release Plate | 360° Pan, 330° Tilt, 330° Roll Motion | Time-Lapse, Inception, Dolly Zoom Modes | MOVA Master App, Camera Control Cables | 2.3 to 3.5" Smartphone Support | 12-Hour Battery Life, Display Screen
features.What's in the box?: Moza AirCross S 3-in-1 Gimbal Stabilizer | L-Bracket | Arca-Type Quick Release Plate | Mini Tripod | Phone Clamp | 1/4"-20 Screw | 2 x Camera Control Cable | Carrying Case with Interior Dividers | Limited 1-Year Manufacturer Warranty
